# Every command-stage run automatically holds this exact stage instance's
# exclusivity lock for its full duration -- claimed ahead of time or not --
# mirroring how a deploy stage has always behaved. This means:
#  1. `breeze inventory` shows a Holder for ANY actively-running claimable stage,
#     not just ones someone bothered to `stage claim` first.
#  2. A DIFFERENT actor's own start attempt on the identical instance is rejected
#     while it's running.
#  3. Cancelling (`stage cancel`, or CancelRunningStages on daemon restart/stop)
#     releases that lock immediately -- a retry isn't blocked by a stale lock
#     left over from a dead run, waiting on its TTL to expire.
env BREEZE_DIR=$WORK/state

exec breeze identity register admin
cp stdout admin.token
exec breeze apply -f pipeline.hcl --as admin --token-file admin.token

# Start a slow build in the background -- no `stage claim` was ever made.
exec breeze stage start release build abc123 --as ci &build&
exec sleep 0.3
exec breeze stage status release build abc123 --json
stdout '"status":\s*"running"'

# The lock shows up automatically, without anyone claiming it first.
exec breeze inventory --json
stdout '"key":\s*"stage/release/build/abc123"'
stdout '"holder":\s*"ci"'

# A different actor's own start on the SAME instance is rejected while it runs.
! exec breeze stage start release build abc123 --as bob
stderr 'already in progress|already claimed'

exec breeze stage cancel release build abc123 --as ci --reason stuck-cancelling
stdout 'build: failed \(cancelled\)'
wait build

# The lock is gone immediately -- not left dangling until its TTL expires.
exec breeze inventory
stdout '\(no resources held\)'

# A fresh start on the SAME commit right after cancellation succeeds -- not
# blocked by a stale lock the dead run left behind.
exec breeze stage start release build newcommit --as bob
stdout 'build: succeeded'

exec breeze stop

-- pipeline.hcl --
pipeline "release" {
  stage "build" {
    type    = "command"
    timeout = "30s"
    command = ["/bin/sh", "-c", "case \"$0\" in abc123) sleep 300 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac", "{commit}"]
  }
}
